meta.version_notes: v6 (22 Apr 2026): §22 Interest Accrual Detail added (per-position rate mechanics from BNY Monthly Report pp. 51-58). Closes holdings.spreadBps gap. v5: tranche names harmonized + full 236-position Asset Info table embedded + explicit 0.00 in §7.5/§7.6. v4: §21 Current-Period Payment Date Execution added. v3: §20 Notes Payment History added. v2: hybrid numerator composition for Event of Default Test.

supplementary_sources.description: Current-period waterfall execution, fees paid, admin expenses, tranche distributions

supplementary_sources.source: BNY Monthly Report Interest Accrual Detail (source pp. 51-58)
supplementary_sources.description: Per-position rate mechanics: 18 fixed-rate bonds + 262 floating-rate loan facilities with spread/base/all-in rate

numerator_composition.description: Aggregate Principal Balance of all Collateral Obligations other than Defaulted Obligations
Sum over each Defaulted Obligation of (Market Value × Principal Balance)
numerator_composition.formula: sum(market_value_i * principal_balance_i for i in defaulted)

numerator_composition.description: Principal Proceeds standing to the credit of the Principal Account on the Measurement Date

par_value_tests.structural_note: Hybrid numerator: component (1) is principal-basis, component (2) is market-value-basis, component (3) is cash. When defaulted obligations = 0, component (2) = 0 and the numerator collapses to Adjusted CPA, making the test functionally equivalent to OC_PAR in this period. Structurally this is NOT OC_PAR: default-scenario modelling must use the compositional spec.

portfolio_profile_tests.test: Sr Secured Bonds / HY Bonds / Mezz
Moody's Aggregate A2 or Lower w P-1
Moody's Aggregate A2 or Lower wo P-1

other_tests.test: Minimum WAS excl floor incl Agg Exc Funded
Minimum WAS excl floor excl Agg Exc Funded

coverage_test_classification_notes.class_A_to_F_PV_tests: Pure OC_PAR — Adjusted CPA numerator, aggregate-par-through-class denominator.
coverage_test_classification_notes.reinvestment_OC_test: OC_PAR variant — Adjusted CPA numerator, aggregate-par-through-F denominator. During Reinvestment Period, triggers interest diversion (50% of residual IP or cure amount) per Interest Waterfall clause (W).
coverage_test_classification_notes.event_of_default_test_10aiv: Compositional hybrid (see par_value_tests[] entry). Principal basis for non-defaulted, market-value basis for defaulted, plus cash component. Denominator is Class A PAO only.
coverage_test_classification_notes.IC_tests: Interest Coverage Amount (per OC Condition 1 definition: Actual Interest Received + plus-lines − minus-lines) over scheduled class-through-X interest.
coverage_test_classification_notes.downstream_modelling_requirement: Coverage-test schema should support compositional numerator specs, not a single testType enum. The Event of Default Test cannot be represented correctly as OC_PAR or OC_MV alone.

notes_payment_history.source: Intex past-cashflows export (ARESEU15_20260420 - Intex Past Cashflows.xlsx)

tranche_distributions.note: Sub note 'interest_paid' is residual distribution per Interest Waterfall clause (DD), not contractual coupon

administrative_expenses.name: Custody, Account Bank and Calculation Agent

management_fees_paid.note: Incentive fee not payable: Sub Note IRR below 12% hurdle

principal_waterfall.note: Principal Account had zero balance this period; all Principal Waterfall clauses A-V paid 0.00 EUR. Clause (V) shows a residual claim of 44,799,999 EUR to Subordinated Notes — unfunded this period.

fee_base_reconciliation.explanation: Per OC Condition 1, fee basis is CPA as of first day of current Due Period (~06-Jan-2026), not current determination date CPA. Use prior-period-end CPA for forward fee projections.

tie_outs.note: (6133 + 250 + 1194.44 + 63465.76 + 176587.19) = 247,630.39 matches the 'Amounts Payable Priority of Payments' line in the Compliance Report IC numerator calculation.
